title: Create /etc/containers/registries.d in (make install)
body:
Per recent conversations; to make it easier to place the registries `.yaml` files into the correct place, and to avoid the question of what happens when the directory is missing.

Cc @lsm5 .

comments.body: @lsm5 PTAL when you have the chance
Are we ready to do another build?
@mtrmac @rhatdan @lsm5 are you with bumping the version and tag it? Reference https://github.com/projectatomic/skopeo/issues/197
Yes please; I would like the TLS enforcement changes to get as much testing as possible.
Do we have enough to work off of master or are we still using a branch?
`docker-daemon:` and the ability to push to tags in docker repositories are still not merged.
@mtrmac we can merge it in master anyway and iterate from master - that transport isn't documented afaict

@runcom With all the FIXME FIXMEs around the place WRT naming and so on?

Well, the branches exist (mtrmac/image:docker-daemon, mtrmac/image:docker-push-to-tag [pretty dubious ATM], perhaps also mtrmac/skopeo:docker-lookaside-tests after the other two are vendored into skopeo); feel free to merge them if you think it will make everyone’s life easier.

> feel free to merge them if you think it will make everyone’s life easier.

if others really benefit from this I'll merge it with all the FIXMEs - otherwise yeah, let not clutter the code all over the place.
Yes I would prefer to work off of master for now.
@runcom let me know when master branch is ready to build
@lsm5 I believe it is - @mtrmac you have the last word I guess
master is “ready to build", yes, but `docker-daemon:` is still only on mtrmac/skopeo:integrate-all-the-things.

Fair enough, if you want this merged, https://github.com/containers/image/pull/88 https://github.com/containers/image/pull/79 + vendor into skopeo, and possibly https://github.com/projectatomic/skopeo/pull/177 .
alright, @lsm5 I'll ping you when master is ready.
